allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; data = json.load\(open\('.raw/.manifest.json'\)\); print\('VALID JSON'\); print\('sources count:', len\(data['sources']\)\); print\('address_map count:', len\(data['address_map']\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const data = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('.raw/.manifest.json', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('VALID JSON'\); console.log\('sources count:', Object.keys\(data.sources\).length\); console.log\('address_map count:', Object.keys\(data.address_map\).length\);")
